name: Capital Radar live state snapshot
failureMode: blocks live action permissions when stale or missing
notes: Authoritative local state container for holdings, quotes, macro rows, candidate state, and operational posture.

name: Yahoo public chart endpoint
failureMode: prices may be stale or unofficial; freshness gate required before action
notes: Used for 1-minute latest price, daily trend, relative strength, and tape anomaly detection. Not thesis evidence by itself.

name: FRED public macro, rates, and credit series
failureMode: macro regime confidence reduced if stale/missing
notes: Primary source family for Treasury rates, inflation expectations, Fed Funds, credit spreads, and liquidity context.

name: SEC company submissions JSON
failureMode: filing evidence unavailable; thesis promotions blocked if primary-source evidence missing
notes: Primary filings metadata for holdings and candidates. Future engine should add companyfacts and filing text extraction.

name: Company investor relations pages
failureMode: source-specific; blocked/JS-heavy pages require alternate primary source
notes: Curated per-company source graph. Not broad web search; specific pages selected by ticker evidence needs.

name: ETF holdings and sector exposure pages
notes: Used to map candidate adjacency, sector pressure, crowded baskets, and substitute exposures.

name: Curated public RSS / source feeds
failureMode: event causality remains unresolved; no final claims from blocked/low-quality extraction
notes: Future feed layer for real-time-ish event detection without whole-web search. Must cite and pass reliability gates.

name: Capital Radar internal archive and run logs
failureMode: learning loop impaired; current action gates unaffected
notes: Stores prior decisions, market reads, candidate promotions/rejections, and lessons learned.

name: Yahoo Finance RSS headline feed (materiality-scored)
failureMode: news gate inactive; HIGH-materiality promotion evidence unavailable
notes: Covers all holdings and candidates. Score ≥8 = HIGH (earnings surprise, M&A, guidance). Score 5-7 = MEDIUM. Score 1-4 = LOW. Only HIGH items can support promotion evidence.

name: SEC EDGAR XBRL company-facts API
failureMode: fundamentals absent; holding and candidate valuation evidence thin
notes: Extracts: revenue, revenue growth YoY, net income, gross margin, EPS diluted, FCF, long-term debt, dilution flag. Skips ETF/leveraged tickers.
